expectations.evidence: Uses #0a0a0a background, rgba(0,255,157,...) for green, rgba(255,59,59,...) for red, custom getPnlBg/getPnlBorder helpers with opacity-based system
SpotlightCard uses backdrop-blur-[14px] backdrop-saturate-120 bg-[rgba(24,24,27,0.55)] with top edge highlight gradient
font-mono on all data, labels, breadcrumbs. font-['Instrument_Sans'] for headings
rounded-lg (8px) on cards, rounded-sm on badges/buttons
SpotlightCard cursor-following glow, border lightens on hover
SectionLabel component with // prefix, 10px uppercase tracking-[0.15em]
tabular-nums class on all numeric values
